Viet's notes

Welcome! On this page you can find a collection of my scribe notes for self-references and learning purposes. Sometimes the notes can be woefully incomplete and so please don't judge. There certainly are typos and other kinds of errors. I would really appreciate it if you could contact me via my email for further feedback and discussion. You can also find out more about me at my personal webpage.
